creator: stankiewiczal@gmail.com
text:
I did setup according to documentation on website. As a client I used
Windows Server 2012 R2. When initiator connects win srv to portal I see
error info on FreeBSD with text about wrong bit flags in command. After
adding more ip from different networks to portal I don't see them on
win srv (mpio test)-just one ip. Portal name has strange/random chars
also.

Fix: 

Unknown
How-To-Repeat: The way to see the issue has been described above.
